title: GRX fallback telemetry evidence document
description: GRX-008 scaffold: fallback telemetry format for Rurix-accelerated passes. This is scaffold-stage format only. Every pass entry is a placeholder; the presence of a pass entry here does NOT mean that pass has been wired up, accelerated, or that a real fallback occurred. No acceleration pass is implemented at this stage and no telemetry is measured. Scaffold documents (run_mode=scaffold / evidence_level=scaffold) may leave telemetry_timestamp/telemetry_frame null but every pass must be disabled with godot_fallback_active=true. Full runs (run_mode=full or evidence_level=measured_local) require a non-empty telemetry_timestamp and a non-negative integer telemetry_frame, and measured_local documents may not use a pass_id starting with placeholder_.

run_mode.description: scaffold = build-stage placeholder plan; full = real telemetry run. Scaffold documents are not eligible as close-out telemetry evidence.

evidence_level.description: measured_local once real telemetry is captured; scaffold placeholder documents use scaffold.

note.description: Must state that this document does not represent any pass being wired up or any real fallback having occurred.

passes.description: Placeholder telemetry entries for candidate acceleration passes. Each entry records enable/disable state, a fallback reason, whether the Godot fallback path is active, and telemetry timestamp/frame/pass id.

pass_id.description: Non-empty identifier of the candidate pass. Naming a pass here does not mean it is implemented.

enable_state.description: Whether the acceleration pass is enabled or disabled. Scaffold passes are disabled.

fallback_reason.description: Why the Godot fallback path is (or would be) active for this pass.

godot_fallback_active.description: True when the Godot fallback path is active (no Rurix acceleration).

telemetry_timestamp.description: Telemetry emission timestamp (e.g. ISO-8601). null placeholder is allowed at the scaffold stage but the field must be present.

telemetry_frame.description: Frame index the telemetry was emitted at. null placeholder is allowed at the scaffold stage but the field must be present.
